news.t: NEUBERGER BERMAN EXPANDS ACTIVELY MANAGED LINEUP WITH LAUNCH OF TOTAL RETURN BOND AND GROWTH ETFS

holdings.infoBox: NBGX is an equity ETF with a total of 53 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 10.40%, Alphabet at 8.90%, Apple at 5.89%, Amazon.com at 5.80%, and Microsoft at 5.40%.

overview.description: The Neuberger Growth ETF (NBGX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is an actively managed fund that invests in large-cap growth stocks from around the globe selected using a research-driven approach. The fund seeks long-term capital appreciation. NBGX was launched on Dec 18, 2024 and is issued by Neuberger Berman.

data.title: NEUBERGER BERMAN EXPANDS ACTIVELY MANAGED LINEUP WITH LAUNCH OF TOTAL RETURN BOND AND GROWTH ETFS
data.text: NEW YORK , Dec. 20, 2024 /PRNewswire/ -- Neuberger Berman, a private, independent, employee-owned investment manager, is pleased to announce the launch of two new actively managed ETFs: Neuberger Berm...
